what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG icon of a VR headset using currentColor stroked shapes: a rounded headset body, two circular lenses, and a short center bridge line.
observations: The SVG uses viewBox="0 0 24 24" with explicit width and height of 24.
The icon has fill="none" and stroke="currentColor" so it inherits text color from its context.
Stroke styling is set to width 1.5 with round line caps and round joins.
The headset shell is a rounded rectangle at x=2, y=9, width=20, height=10, rx=2.
Two lens circles are centered at (8,14) and (16,14) with radius 2.5.
A short horizontal path connects the lens area from x=11 to x=13 at y=14.
standouts: Uses simple geometric primitives rather than a single compound path.
The icon is color-adaptive through currentColor.
The visual read is built from a rectangular visor plus two lens circles.
conventions: Follows a common 24x24 outline icon convention.
Uses no fill and a consistent stroked outline style.
Keeps all visual elements inline in a single SVG element.
Does not include embedded title, desc, role, or aria attributes.
concerns: No accessible title, description, role, or aria labeling is present in the SVG markup.
notes: A compact outline SVG asset representing a VR headset icon with inherited stroke color.
questions: Should accessibility labeling be provided inside this SVG or by the consuming component?
Should the explicit width and height remain fixed at 24 or be controlled by the surrounding icon system?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a VR headset icon, and the SVG content depicts a VR headset.
intention_signals: It appears intended to serve as a reusable UI icon for virtual reality, headset, immersive, or device-related actions or labels.
novelty: The lens details are represented as two visible circles inside a rounded visor, giving the icon an explicit headset-and-lenses structure.
contribution: Contributes a reusable currentColor outline VR headset glyph with fixed 24x24 geometry and a small set of primitive SVG shapes suitable for an icon library.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor outline SVG icon depicting a VR headset with a rounded rectangular visor, two circular lenses, and a short bridge line.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for providing a reusable visual icon asset representing a VR headset in a design system or interface.
